prompt: Please link URS-200 (Inventory Mgmt) to FS-200 (Stock Updates), and then link FS-200 to DS-200 (Database Trigger). Once that's done, generate the OQ test scripts for FS-200.

expected.linkRequirements: create traceability links: URS-200 to FS-200, and FS-200 to DS-200.
expected.generateTestCases: generate Operational Qualification (OQ) test scripts for FS-200 (Stock Updates).
